overall.description: A cinematic panoramic view from a hillside overlooking Los Santos in GTA V during dawn. The camera pans across the landscape showing the city skyline, winding highways, and distant mountains with a snow-capped peak, all bathed in warm golden hour light with atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: hillside overlook panning toward mountain vista

events.description: camera pans right revealing distant snow-capped mountain peak illuminated by dawn light

agents.ego_description: stationary on hillside panning camera right to survey the mountain vista and distant peaks

entered.detail: snow-capped mountain peak visible in the distance with pink dawn light hitting the summit
radio transmission towers silhouetted on the hilltop against the sky
large boulders and rocky terrain in the immediate foreground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of the Los Santos skyline on the left. As the camera pans right, the city exits the frame and the mountainous terrain dominates the view. A distant snow-capped peak becomes visible in the center, bathed in pink dawn light, while communication towers appear on the left hilltop. The highway winds through the valley below, shifting from center to right as the pan continues.

agents.ego_description: stationary on hillside panning camera left to survey the city skyline and urban valley below

entered.detail: modern glass skyscrapers of downtown Los Santos reappearing as camera pans left

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left from the mountain vista back toward the city. The distant snow peak and communication towers exit the frame as the Los Santos skyline re-enters from the left and moves toward the center. The camera continues panning across the urban landscape, showing the highway interchange in the valley and the dense cluster of downtown skyscrapers against the dawn sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous panoramic sweep that shifts from the urban skyline of Los Santos to a distant mountain vista before returning to the city center. It begins with the city skyline on the left, panning right as the urban landscape exits the frame to reveal a rugged mountainous terrain. As the movement continues, a snow-capped peak bathed in pink dawn light emerges in the center while communication towers appear on a nearby hilltop and a winding highway shifts across the valley. The camera then reverses its direction, panning left to move away from the peaks and towers as the Los Santos skyline re-enters the frame. Finally, the view settles on the dense cluster of downtown skyscrapers and the complex highway interchange below, all silhouetted against the glowing dawn sky.
